content.en:
Godless City.

There is only one eternal master in this city, that is, the godless city lord, this is not a giant city, it can only be regarded as an ordinary city.

In the boundary river, there are still many such cities, almost all of which were established by a certain eternal master himself, and the power is far inferior to a giant city, basically those who can build a giant city are the strongest among the eternal masters.

Such as the Qinglian master!

And the Godless City Lord is too weak, and he is weak among the Eternal Masters, so where is he qualified to build a giant city.

In the godless city, there is not even the gate of the boundary river.

Cultivators in the Godless City, if they want to go through the experience, they can only rely on flying.

Of course, in the Godless City, only cultivators who are completely loyal to the Godless City Lord are qualified to train, and the others can only stay in the Godless City for the rest of their lives, forging weapons, refining treasures, pills, etc., for the Godless City Lord, or being taken into a certain forbidden area to go to the "640" expedition to die.

It can be said that the cultivators of the Godless City are very miserable.

this day.

Ye Tian kept shuttling through the boundary river, and finally arrived at the area where the godless city was located.

He then walked towards the Godless City.

Very few outsiders came to the Godless City, so after Ye Tian came to the Godless City, he was immediately noticed by the cultivators of the Godless City.

Of course, it wasn't that no one came, but most of the people who dared to come were cultivators with backgrounds.

With such cultivators, the Godless City Lord would not dare to control them.

There are also self-contained transactions within the Godless City, and everyone is eager for someone who can reach the realm of the Eternal Controller, so as to escape the control of the Godless City Lord, or become a strong person and be loyal to the Godless City Lord.

When Ye Tian walked into the Godless City, a woman from the peak Legendary Realm of the first level walked in front of Ye Tian.

"My lord, do you need a guide?"

The woman asked.

"Guide, interesting!" Ye Tian nodded slightly and said, "Yes, how many boundary river coins do you want?"

"100 Boundary River Coins!"

The woman spoke.

"Here you go!"

Ye Tian took out 100 Realm River Coins, gave them to the woman, and immediately said, "Tell me about the situation in Godless City." "

The woman accepted the boundary river coins and immediately said, "My lord, we have three trading areas in Godless City, and we can buy a lot of treasures......

The woman said a lot, but it was not information that Ye Tian imagined she knew.

So, Ye Tian asked directly, "I want to know where you godless city lords have gone?"

"Godless City Lord !!"

The woman's expression changed drastically, this person dared to ask the godless city lord directly, even if she knew, she didn't dare to say, in the godless city lord, who dared to mention the godless city lord?

"My lord, if you want to find the Godless City Lord, you can go to the Godless City Lord's Mansion, and some adults in the Godless City Lord's Mansion can tell you on your behalf, I am a small person, how do you know!" the prince explained.

"Let's go, take me to all over the godless place!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He knew that the Godless City Lord was not in the Godless City, so he didn't do it immediately.

He guessed that the godless city lord should have gone out, and at most an avatar would stay here.

Therefore, he was prepared to wait a few days, and if the Godless City Lord had not returned, he would change his plans.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian also stayed in Godless City for a few days.

He also knew what the name of this guide was, her name was Cai Li, and her parents were also cultivators of the Godless City, but they had gone out with the Godless City Lord a long time ago and never came back.

As for the results, it is obvious.

However, Cai Li did not say much and did not dare to discuss it.

Ye Tian has not been in Godless City, nor has he bought anything, which naturally attracted the attention of the Godless City Lord's Mansion.

Godless City Lord's Mansion.

The pro-guards are reporting the situation to the godless city lord, and the godless city lord who stayed here is naturally a clone.

"Lord of the City, there is a foreign cultivator who behaves very strangely, he has been here for a long time, but he doesn't buy any items and doesn't leave. What should I do now, do I want to take him down?" asked the captain of the guard.

The Godless City Lord said: "I have spied on him with the magic circle, but I can't see through him, there should be an eternal controller behind him, so I can't catch him." Don't worry about him for now, as long as he doesn't cause trouble, and he wants to stay in the godless city, then let him stay, and when it comes to a certain time, charge him a fee, otherwise drive him away. "

"Yes, Lord of the Castle!"

The captain of the pro-guard replied.

A few more days passed, and the godless city lord's body finally returned.

"It's time to do it!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Immediately, he said to Caili: "You go first, there will be a big battle soon, don't get close." "

War?

Cai Li wondered, where would there be a battle in Godless City?

But the next moment, her pupils shrank, and she thought of something..........

I saw that at this time, Ye Tian had already crossed the void and arrived at the City Lord's Mansion in Godless City.

"Who dares to approach the City Lord's Mansion and look for death!"

Dozens of members of the pro-guard team appeared, each of them had the combat power of a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, they were the most elite subordinates of the Godless City Lord, and the captain of the escort team was a half-step eternal master.

"Extinguish!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and the terrifying space-time forbidden domain imprisoned these members of the pro-guard team, and then killed them with a single thought.

In an instant, all of these cultivators fell and turned into corpses.

Rumble!!!!

The Godless City Lord appeared, and endless killing intent emerged from him.

At this moment, he didn't care, he had to kill Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian had the support of the Eternal Controller behind him, he would do it.

Ye Tian killed his elite for no reason, and this matter couldn't end like this.

You must know that several of these cultivators are the main body, and once the main body dies, all the other doppelgangers dissipate, and it is really a complete fall.

As a result, the loss of the godless city is great.

"A half-step eternal master, who dares to kill me, is looking for death!"

The godless city lord was furious, holding a spear in his hand and stabbing directly.

The blow of the Eternal Master seemed to completely control all the rules here, leaving even the half-step Eternal Master powerless to resist.

In his opinion, this blow can kill Ye Tian.

The end is set!

However. 1.7

Ye Tian took out the Hundred Realms Stick, pulled it out one by one, and blasted towards the Godless City Lord.

"A thousand kills!"

Ye Tian used this top-notch space-time control technique, and combined with the Hundred Realms Stick to deliver an unimaginable blow.

Click!

The spear of the godless city lord was shattered, and the Hundred Realms stick attacked like a broken bamboo, and another blow shattered the armor of the godless city lord, directly knocking the godless city lord away, piercing through the magic circle of the godless city, and falling into the boundary river.

And Ye Tian stepped out of the Godless City in one step and stepped into the Boundary River.

"Forbidden Space!"

"Walk in the Void!"

Ye Tian successively used two top-notch space-time control techniques to hunt down the godless city lord and make it impossible for him to escape.

Thundered!!!

The godless city lord was completely crushed.

And at this moment, the cultivators in the Godless City were all stunned.

The Godless City Lord was actually crushed by a half-step Eternal Master?_
